creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 152631
Patch to the ports tree

This is an udpate to a pending bug request:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=197108

The latter updated devel/visualparadigm to 12.0. The present patch, applied to the current port version in the tree updates to 12.0-hotfix that upstream released due to several memory leaks and stability issues.

Attached patch for the port and poudriere logs for {8.4,9.3,10.1}amd64
